Traditional_Chinese: 重置扭蛋？此操作無法撤銷。

English: Preview how items look on your character.
Traditional_Chinese: 預覽外觀在角色身上的效果。

English: Will your guild be the one to win a trip to Manila? \nTake your chance by participating in the FWC PvP Contest! \nRegister your guild, choose your top %d players, and battle to the end!
Traditional_Chinese: 您的公會能否贏得馬尼拉之旅？\n參加 FWC 玩家對戰大賽，把握機會！\n註冊您的公會，選出您最優秀的前 %d 位玩家，戰鬥到最後一刻！

English: Organize the lineup for FWC PvP Contest again?
Traditional_Chinese: 再次安排 FWC 玩家對戰比賽的人員名單？

English: Confirm the line up for FWC PvP Contest? You cannot change it after.
Traditional_Chinese: 確認 FWC 玩家對戰比賽的人員名單？確認後無法更改。

English: Set Entry List for FWC PvP Contest
Traditional_Chinese: 設定 FWC 玩家對戰比賽的參賽人員名單

English: Add a connected Guild Member to the entrant list.
Traditional_Chinese: 將線上的一位公會成員新增至參賽名單。

English: Delete a Guild Member from the entrant list.
Traditional_Chinese: 從參賽名單單中刪除一位公會成員。

English: Arrange the selected Guild member to the upper side.
Traditional_Chinese: 將選中的公會成員排列到上方。

English: Arrange the selected Guild member to the lower side.
Traditional_Chinese: 將選中的公會成員排列到下方。
重新製作參賽人員名單。

English: Register your team. You can select a maximum of %d participating players. #b#cffff0000You CANNOT change the participating members later after registering.#nc#nb
Traditional_Chinese: 註冊您的隊伍。您最多可以選擇 %d 名參賽人員。#b#cffff0000註冊後無法更改參賽人員。#nc#nb

English: A maximum of %d members can join the FWC PvP Contest. Choose your best players wisely.
Traditional_Chinese: 最多可有 %d 名成員參加 FWC 玩家對戰比賽。請謹慎選擇您最優秀的玩家。

English: Select today's match schedules. Please note that if you're not here in time, your opponent will receive an #binstant#nb win. You can only pick #bone#nb match per day.
Traditional_Chinese: 請選擇今日比賽排程。請注意，如果您未能及時到達，您的對手將獲得一場 #binstant#nb 的勝利。您每天只能選擇一場 #bone#nb 的比賽。

English: Your match will start in a few minutes. Do you want to teleport to the match arena? #b#cffff0000Declining means you won't be able to join later.#nc#nb
Traditional_Chinese: 您的比賽將在幾分鐘後開始，您想傳送至比賽場地嗎？#b#cffff0000拒絕意味著您之後將無法加入。#nc#nb

English: Select the zone you wish to enter.
Traditional_Chinese: 選擇您想要進入的區域。

English: In %d seconds, you will enter zone %s.
Your next match will start at: %s
Traditional_Chinese: 您的下一場比賽將於以下時間開始：%s

English: Attempt Piercing on Weapon, Shield, or Suit
Traditional_Chinese: 嘗試穿洞武器、盾牌或衣服

English: Attempt Safe Gear or Accessory Upgrade
Traditional_Chinese: 嘗試安全升級裝備或飾品

English: Upgrade Gear or Accessory to %s or Higher
Traditional_Chinese: 將裝備或飾品升級到 %s 或更高

English: Kill Normal Monsters in a Party
Traditional_Chinese: 在劇團中擊殺普通怪物

English: Clear a Dungeon in a Party
Add a Fashion Item to the Wardrobe
Increase a Skill to Max Level
Traditional_Chinese: 將技能提升至最高等級

Traditional_Chinese: 向 [新手指導員] 胖胖取得增益

English: Perform %s or More Combos Using the Action Slot
Traditional_Chinese: 使用連續技能執行 %s 或更多連擊

English: Wear a Set With a Set Effect
Traditional_Chinese: 穿上裝備，獲得套裝效果

English: %s ends at: #b%s#nb (Server Time)\nWeekly points limit: #b%d / %d#nb\n#iPoints earned from Season missions are not counted toward the weekly limit.#ni
Traditional_Chinese: %s結束於：#b%s#nb\n每週積分上限：#b%d / %d#nb\n#i賽季任務獲得的積分不計入每週積分上限。#ni

English: %s ends at: #b%s#nb (Server Time)\n#iSome rewards are enhanced after reaching level %d.#ni

English: The Starter Pass does not expire and is available to all players who purchase it.
Traditional_Chinese: 新手通行證沒有有效期限，所有購買的玩家均可使用。

English: View and manage your equipment switches.
Traditional_Chinese: 檢視和管理您的裝備切換。

English: You must enter a preset name!
Traditional_Chinese: 您必須輸入裝備配置名稱！

Traditional_Chinese: 您輸入的裝備配置名稱無效！

English: Are you sure you want to delete the %s preset?
Traditional_Chinese: 您確定要刪除 %s 裝備配置嗎？

English: You need to select a preset.
Traditional_Chinese: 您需要選擇一個裝備配置。

English: This contains all the ranking data for the current FWC PvP Contest.\nIf only one guild has showed up in the preliminary's ranking, then that means it had no opponent!\n#b#uClick on a guild to see the participating players stats.#nu#nb
Traditional_Chinese: 此包含當前 FWC 玩家對戰競賽的所有排名數據。\n如果只有一個公會出現在初賽排名中，則表示它沒有對手！\n#b#u 按下一個公會以檢視參賽玩家的統計數據。#nu#nb
FWC 玩家對戰比賽排名

English: You can summon Info-Pang again via Menu > Helper > Info-Pang.
Traditional_Chinese: 您可以透過選單 > 助手 > 資訊胖胖再次召喚資訊胖胖。

English: You can view this information again if you click Info-Pang > Right Click > Check the List.
Traditional_Chinese: 如果您按下資訊胖胖 > 右鍵 > 檢查列表，您可以再次檢視此資訊。

English: Here you can select a match and spectate it. #bNote: you will be invisible for participating players and will only be able to communicate with others spectators.#nb
Traditional_Chinese: 您可以在這裡選擇一場比賽並觀看。#b注意：您對參賽玩家將不可見，只能與其他觀眾通訊。#nb

English: Do you want to spectate that match? You will get teleported in the match arena.
Traditional_Chinese: 您想觀看那場比賽嗎？您將被傳送到比賽競技場。

English: Select the server you want to transfer your character to. Please check our website for the exact transfer rules.
Traditional_Chinese: 請選擇您要將角色轉移到的伺服器。請造訪我們的網站檢視具體的轉移規則。

English: Note that transfer requests are done periodically so the transfer is not immediate after using the scroll.
Traditional_Chinese: 請注意，轉移請求會在指定日期執行，因此在使用卷軸後不會立即轉移。

English: Select the server you want to transfer your character to. The transfer will take place after the FWC server closes, and you can still play on your character until then. If you're not sure where you want to transfer, you can close this window and choose the next time you log in. Once you confirm your server, you can't change your choice.
Traditional_Chinese: 請選擇您要將角色轉移到的伺服器。轉移將在 FWC 伺服器關閉後執行，在此之前您仍然可以使用您的角色進行遊戲。如果您不確定要轉移到哪個伺服器，您可以關閉此窗口，並在下次登入時選擇。一旦您確認了伺服器，您將無法更改您的選擇。

English: Fullscreen is not available. If you use Safari press Share > Add to Home Screen and launch the game from your App List.
Traditional_Chinese: 無法使用全螢幕。如果您使用 Safari，請點選「分享」>「加入主畫面」，並從 App 列表啟動遊戲。

English: Are you sure you want to transfer your character to %s? You cannot change your choice after confirming.
Traditional_Chinese: 您確定要將角色轉移到 %s 嗎？確認後無法更改。

English: RPS Game\nYou can use the Global Limited Gacha only if you win.
Traditional_Chinese: 剪刀布遊戲\n只有贏了才能使用全球限定抽卡。

English: When opening the Random Gacha, you will receive one of the items listed below.\nThe prize pool is shared among all players on the server and each item has a limited quantity.\nThe pool resets at 00:00 server time.
Traditional_Chinese: 開啟隨機抽卡時，您將收到下列其中一個物品。\n獎金池在伺服器上所有玩家共享，每個物品的數量有限。\n該池在伺服器時間 00:00 重置。

English: Would you like to accept the item?
Traditional_Chinese: 您是否確認領取此物品？

English: Purchase requirement is level %d or higher
Traditional_Chinese: 購買要求為 %d 級或更高

English: The Costume Box Upgrade Level has decreased
Traditional_Chinese: 時裝盒升級等級已降低

%s ends at: #b%s#nb (UTC Time)
Weekly points limit: #b%d / %d#nb
#iPoints earned from Season missions are not counted toward the weekly limit.#ni
#iSome rewards are enhanced after reaching level %d.#ni

%s 結束於：#b%s#nb (UTC 時間) 
每週積分上限：#b%d / %d#nb

English: %s ends at: #b%s#nb (UTC Time)\nWeekly points limit: #b%d / %d#nb\n#iPoints earned from Season missions are not counted toward the weekly limit.#ni
Traditional_Chinese: %s 結束於：#b%s#nb (UTC 時間) \n每週積分上限：#b%d / %d#nb\n#i 賽季任務獲得的積分不計入每週積分上限。#ni

English: %s ends at: #b%s#nb (UTC Time)\n#iSome rewards are enhanced after reaching level %d.#ni

銀行背包擴充剩餘時間：%s

English: Fly through items throughout the race to use them against others!
Traditional_Chinese: 在比賽過程中收集各種道具，並用它們來對抗其他玩家！

English: You've received a speed penalty for leaving the track - return now or you'll be disqualified!
Traditional_Chinese: 因為您駛離賽道而被處以降速懲罰 - 請立即返回賽道，否則將被取消比賽資格！
這將扣除 %lld 金幣。您是否要繼續？

English: View the rankings of the previous race.
Traditional_Chinese: 檢視上一次比賽的排名。

English: Level 150+ Unique weapons can be converted into Ultimate weapons.\nTo convert, your unique weapon must be upgraded to +10, and you must provide 3 Shining Oricalkums, 3 Ultimate Orbs, and 100,000,000 Penya. Ultimate weapons retain all elemental upgrades, piercings, and stats upon conversion.
Traditional_Chinese: 等級 150 以上的唯一武器可以轉換為究極武器。\n轉換時，您的唯一武器必須強化至 +10，並提供 3 個閃耀奧里哈鋼、3 個終極寶珠和 1 億金幣。轉換後，究極武器會保留所有元素升級、穿洞和素質。

English: This item cannot be made Ultimate.
Do you wish to apply the Fixed Stat upgrade to the following item?\n(%s)
Traditional_Chinese: 您希望將固定能力值升級應用到以下物品嗎？\n(%s)

English: Do you wish to apply the Random Stat upgrade to the following item?\n(%s)
Traditional_Chinese: 您希望將隨機能力值升級應用到以下物品嗎？\n(%s)

English: Do you wish to apply the Random Special Option upgrade to the following item?\n(%s)
Traditional_Chinese: 您希望將隨機特殊選項升級應用到以下物品嗎？\n(%s)

English: Please input an item which you want to upgrade.
Please input a material item first.
Without a Scroll of XProtect, the item will be destroyed if upgrading fails.
Traditional_Chinese: 沒有 XProtect 卷軸，升級失敗時物品將被摧毀。

English: Select a template for your house.\n\n#b#cffff0000Changing your house template will remove all currently placed decorations and NPCs! Save them to a preset to restore them later.#nc#nb
Traditional_Chinese: 選擇您房屋的範本。\n\n#b#cffff0000 更改您的房屋範本將移除所有當前放置的裝飾品和 NPC！將它們保存到預設以便稍後恢復。#nc#nb

English: Select this template?\n#bNote:#nb If you already own a house, this action will remove all currently placed decorations and NPCs.
Traditional_Chinese: 選擇此範本嗎？\n#b注意：#nb如果您已擁有房屋，此操作將移除所有當前放置的裝飾品和 NPC。

English: Select a friend to visit. Only friends who are online and allow you to visit are listed here.
Traditional_Chinese: 選擇要拜訪的朋友。此處只列出在線且允許您拜訪的朋友。

English: You will receive the following housing objects.
Traditional_Chinese: 您將收到以下房屋物件。

English: Return all placed housing objects to your house inventory? #bYou can place them again later.#nb
Traditional_Chinese: 回歸所有放置的房屋物件到您的房屋庫存？#b您可以稍後再次放置它們。#nb

English: Select a housing object and click Place Object, then:- Use the mouse wheel to rotate it\n- Hold the mouse wheel and move the mouse left/right to resize it\n- Left-click to finalize placement
Traditional_Chinese: 選擇房屋物件並按下放置物件，然後：- 使用滑鼠滾輪旋轉它\n- 按住滑鼠滾輪並左右移動滑鼠調整大小\n- 左鍵按下以最終確定放置

English: When placed, this house NPC grants the following bonuses:
Traditional_Chinese: 當放置時，此房屋 NPC 提供以下獎勵：

English:
You can place a bid on this Guild Ship. In #b#u%s#nb#nu, the guild with the highest bid will gain ownership of this Guild Ship. 

#b#uNote:#nu#nb 
- You can only bid on one Guild Ship at a time. 
- The Penya used to place a bid is taken from your Guild Bank. 
- You can increase your bid at any time before the bidding period ends.
Traditional_Chinese:
您可以對此公會飛船出價。在 #b#u%s#nb#nu，出價最高的公會將獲得此公會飛船的所有權。

#b#u注意：#nu#nb
- 您一次只能對一艘公會飛船出價。
- 用於出價的佩尼亞取自您的公會銀行。
- 您可以在競價期結束前隨時增加出價。

English: Enter the amount you wish to bid. #b#uBids are placed using Penya from your Guild Bank.#nu#nb
Traditional_Chinese: 輸入您想出價的金額。#b#u使用來自您的公會銀行的佩尼亞進行出價。#nu#nb

English: There are currently no bids for this Guild Ship.
Traditional_Chinese: 目前沒有對此公會飛船的出價。

English: Time Remaining to Select the Artifact Position:
Traditional_Chinese: 選擇神器位置的剩餘時間：

English: Are you sure you want your guild's artifact to spawn here? #b#cffff0000Note: A %s Penya fee will be taken from your guild's bank.#nc#nb
Traditional_Chinese: 您確定要讓公會的神器在此生成嗎？#b#cffff0000注意：將從您的公會銀行中扣除 %s 佩尼亞費用。#nc#nb

English: A Guild Ship Artifact is somewhere here...
Your guild does not own a Guild Ship.
Traditional_Chinese: 您的公會不擁有公會飛船。

English:
If your guild owns a Guild Ship, every other Saturday you must place an Artifact at one of the designated locations. Placing an Artifact costs #b#u%s Penya#nu#nb.

If your guild does not own a Guild Ship, you can register for the next Artifact Battle for #b#u%s Penya#nu#nb for a chance to obtain one.
You can only apply or cancel up to 1 hour before the battle begins.


Once the Artifact is placed, your guild must defend it on the PK channel against other players. If you fail to defend it, you will lose ownership of the Guild Ship.

If you successfully defend it, #ba portion of the registration fee will be refunded.#nb
Traditional_Chinese:
如果您的公會擁有公會飛船，您必須每隔一個星期六在指定位置之一放置一個神器。放置神器花費 #b#u%s 佩尼亞#nu#nb。

如果您的公會不擁有公會飛船，您可以為下一場神器戰役註冊 #b#u%s 佩尼亞#nu#nb以有機會獲得一個。
您最多可以在戰役開始前 1 小時申請或取消。


一旦神器被放置，您的公會必須在 PK 頻道上防守它以抵禦其他玩家。如果您失敗，您將失去公會飛船的所有權。

如果您成功防守它，#b部分註冊費將被退款。#nb

English: You can manage housing presets for this house template in this window. Click a preset to preview object and NPC placements.\n\n#b#uNote:#nb#nu Applying a preset will remove all currently placed decorations and NPCs. Only the NPCs you have placed will be saved to the preset list. Decorations or NPCs that have expired will not be placed when applying a preset.
Traditional_Chinese: 您可以在此視窗中管理此房屋範本的房屋預設。按下預設以預覽物件和 NPC 放置。\n\n#b#u注意：#nb#nu應用預設將移除所有當前放置的裝飾品和 NPC。只有您放置的 NPC 將保存到預設列表。已過期的裝飾品或 NPC 在應用預設時不會被放置。

English: You have to set a name.
The name you set for the preset is incorrect!
Traditional_Chinese: 您為預設設定的名稱不正確！

English: To report a player, please send a message through our Discord Modmail with valid evidence. Open Discord now?
Traditional_Chinese: 要舉報玩家，請通過我們的 Discord ModMail 發送帶有有效證據的訊息。現在開啟 Discord 嗎？

English: Create Ultimate weapons during the event period to earn rewards!\nYou can earn additional rewards based on how many you create.
Traditional_Chinese: 在活動期間建立究極武器以獲得獎勵！\n您可以根據建立的數量獲得額外獎勵。

English: Upgrade Ultimate weapons during the event period to earn rewards!\nYou can earn additional rewards based on the upgrade level.
Traditional_Chinese: 在活動期間升級究極武器以獲得獎勵！\n您可以根據升級等級獲得額外獎勵。

English: #cffff0000The result will be Account-Linked because some of the materials are Account-Linked.#nc
Traditional_Chinese: #cffff0000結果將被帳戶綁定，因為某些材料是帳戶綁定的。#nc

English: #cffff0000The result will be Soul-Linked because some of the materials are Soul-Linked.#nc
Traditional_Chinese: #cffff0000結果將被綁定，因為某些材料是綁定的。#nc

English: The Rainbow Race will begin shortly. Teleport to the starting point? If you decline, you will be disqualified with no refund.
Traditional_Chinese: 彩虹競賽即將開始。您想傳送到起點嗎？拒絕將取消您的比賽資格，且不予退款。

English: Log in with your Flyff Universe account email or username
Traditional_Chinese: 使用您的 Flyff Universe 帳號電子郵件或用戶名登入

English: Client performance is low.\nPlease review the following tips:
Traditional_Chinese: 客戶端效能低。\n請檢視以下提示：

English: 1) Adjust the in-game video/graphic settings to match your PC.
Traditional_Chinese: 1) 調整遊戲中的影像/圖形設定以匹配您的 PC。

English: 2) Make sure hardware acceleration is enabled in your browser.
Traditional_Chinese: 2) 確保在瀏覽器中啟用硬體加速。

English: Additional inventory slots can be unlocked by completing certain quests or achievements, or by using an Extra Bag (available in the Flyff Shop).
Traditional_Chinese: 可以通過完成特定任務或成就或使用背包擴充 (在 Flyff 商店中提供) 來解鎖額外庫存欄位。

English: Additional slots can be unlocked by increasing your couple level or proposing with a higher-grade couple ring.
Traditional_Chinese: 可以通過提高您的情侶等級或使用更高等級的情侶戒指求婚來解鎖額外欄位。

English: Uncompleted quests that unlock inventory slots:
Traditional_Chinese: 未完成的可解鎖庫存欄位的任務：

English: Unclaimed or incomplete achievements that unlock inventory slots:
Traditional_Chinese: 未領取或未完成的可解鎖庫存欄位的成就：

English: Retrieve all items to your inventory
Traditional_Chinese: 取回全部道具到您的背包中

English: Shift+Left-click or Right-click to view the contents.
Traditional_Chinese: 按住 Shift 鍵並按滑鼠左鍵或按滑鼠右鍵檢視內容。
按住 Shift 鍵並點選滑鼠左鍵檢視內容。

English: Long press to view the contents.
Displays the Upgradable Item Pack Menu.
Traditional_Chinese: 顯示可升級物品包選單。

English: When you open an egg, you can receive all of the items listed below.\nIf you successfully upgrade the egg, you will receive higher-ranked items. If the upgrade fails, the egg may be downgraded or destroyed.
Traditional_Chinese: 當您開啟蛋時，您可以收到下面列出的所有物品。\n如果您成功升級蛋，您將收到更高等級的物品。如果升級失敗，蛋可能會降級或被摧毀。

English: Drag and drop an upgradable item pack into the item slot.
Traditional_Chinese: 將可升級物品包拖放到物品欄位中。

English: Successful upgrades increase the reward. Failed upgrades may downgrade or destroy the item.\nProceed?

Traditional_Chinese: 如果在 %d ~ %d 分鐘內到達首領房間，即可進入白銀等級。白銀等級會出現一般首領的更強版本。
